title: Crystal Scented Candles Gift Set for Women, Meditation 7 Chakra Candles Set, Spiritual Healing Candles for Yoga, Cleansing, Manifesting, Relaxation
features: 7 Chakra Crystal Candles Set: Each candle includes chakra tumble stones giving you the most healing and balances your chakras.

Variety of Unique Aromas: Choose from 7 different aromatherapy scents and a wonderful selection that includes Lemongrass, Coconut Mango, Lavender Jasmine, Sea Salt Sage, Black Currant, Vanilla, Tweed. Each serving a unique purpose that will bring balance, stress relief, and calm into your life.

A Perfect Meditation Solution: Whether you enjoy the amazing benefits of a proper meditation routine, you like pampering your senses with delicate aromas or you simply need an efficient relaxing method after work, the chakra candles are the perfect solution!

Made with Soy Wax. Each candle is 1.4 oz;Burns for 10-15 hours. Measures 0.8"H x 2.2"D. Please place lit candle on a stable heat-resistant surface. Keep away from children & pets or anything that catch fire.
Gift box packaging is a good gift choice for friends and loved ones weddings, holidays, Mother's Day, Christmas.
description: Product Description Inspireyes 7 Chakra Crystal Scented Candles Chakra candles have been used for years to focus intent and balance energy centres during meditation sessions and healing practices. Chakra candles have become popular with home decorators for their stunning colour, design and soothing fragrances which create a calming and harmonious environment. It is thought there are seven major chakras associated with our physical, mental, and emotional wellbeing and that when all the seven chakras are in balance, they will promote wellness in your body, mind, and spirit. Each chakra is represented with a specifically coloured and scented candle, which when lit is designed to enhance certain healing energies. Crown Higher Concesness & Divine connection 3rd Eye Intuition, foresight & Imagination Throat Ability to speak and communicate clearly Heart Self-love and love for others Solar Self Esteem.will power & Responsibility Sacral Creative energies Root Our foundation representing safety, security & Stability Mediation Guide: Set your Space Light your Chakra Balancing Candle. Turn on healing frequencies. Find a space where you can focus without outside distractions. Find a comfortable place to sit. Set your Intention Close your eyes and set your intentions. Take deep healing breaths. Use mindfulness techniques like visualization. Focus your attention on each Chakra point. Turn inward and connect deeply with yourself. No dipping in artificial fragrance contains organic and non-toxic incense ingredients, including Lemongrass, Coconut Mango, Lavender Jasmine, Sea Salt Sage, Black Currant, Vanilla, Tweed. Made with Natural Soy Wax. Please place lit candle on a stable heat-resistant surface. Keep away from children & pets or anything that catch fire. Each candle includes chakra tumble stones giving you the most healing and balances your chakras. Scented Candles Gift Set-Variety of Unique Aroma Whether you enjoy the amazing benefits of a proper meditation routine, you like pampering your senses with delicate aromas or you simply need an efficient relaxing method after work, the Inspireyes Aromatherapy Candles are your perfect solution! Safety Instructions: Burn within sight. Keep away from children and pets. Keep away from things that catch fire. Place lit a candle on a stable heat-resistant surface. Burning Instructions: Before lighting, please keep the wick centered and trimmed to 1/4 inch for safety and an even burn. Do not move while lit or until wax hardens. Stop burning when 1/2 inch unmelted wax remains. Store the candle in a dry & cool place below 30 degrees when not in use.
